fields.label: Storage Permit or MOU
fields.name: StoragePermitOrMOU_DKL__c

fields.calculatedFormula:
IF(
    AND(
        NOT(ISBLANK(HaulagePermitOrMOUExpiryDate_DKL__c)),
        HaulagePermitOrMOUExpiryDate_DKL__c < TODAY()
    ),
    "Haulage Permit / MOU has expired. ",
    ""
)
&
IF(
    AND(
        NOT(ISBLANK(OffTakePermitExpiryDate_DKL__c)),
        OffTakePermitExpiryDate_DKL__c < TODAY()
    ),
    "Offtake Permit has expired. ",
    ""
)
&
IF(
    AND(
        NOT(ISBLANK(StoragePermitOrMOUExpiryDate_DKL__c)),
        StoragePermitOrMOUExpiryDate_DKL__c < TODAY()
    ),
    "Storage Permit has expired.",
    ""
)
fields.label: Permit Expiry Status
fields.name: PermitExpiryStatus_DKL__c
